display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#475467, #c5cedb); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Daily Index reads public.scraped_jobs through GET /api/jobs/supa and does not trigger live scraping.

switch.text: Daily Index reads public.scraped_jobs through GET /api/jobs/supa and does not trigger live scraping.

g.data-meta-label: View Job Details and Save or Update Job Status are separate use cases and are not included here.
